name: tr(L) / (2|V|)
definition: trace of graph Laplacian / (2 * vertex count)

name: rho(A) / |V|
definition: spectral radius of adjacency / vertex count

name: Path length / |V|
reason: = |E|/|V| by definition for path graphs. This IS the closure-cycle normalization.

name: Normalized closure-cycle cost
definition: edges traversed per vertex in closure cycle = |E|/|V|
reason: = |E|/|V| exactly. The closure cycle traverses the shell graph; each traversed edge adds 1/|V| to the exponent.
